items.title: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
items.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
items.author: freeCodeCamp
items.summary_zh: freeCodeCamp 是开源的全栈编程课程平台，提供从 HTML 到机器学习的免费学习资源。开发者可借此系统提升编程能力，并参与贡献开源项目。
items.summary_en: freeCodeCamp is an open-source platform offering a comprehensive curriculum in math, programming, and computer science. Developers can use it to learn full-stack development for free and contribute to its codebase.

items.title: microsoft/markitdown
items.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
items.author: microsoft
items.summary_zh: Markitdown 是微软出品的 Python 工具，可将各类办公文档（如 Word、PDF）转换为 Markdown 格式。开发者可借此简化文档处理流程，提升内容迁移与自动化效率。
items.summary_en: Markitdown is a Python tool from Microsoft that converts office documents like Word and PDF into Markdown. It helps developers automate document transformation and streamline content migration workflows.

items.title: mattpocock/skills
items.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.author: mattpocock
items.summary_zh: mattpocock/skills 源自作者 Claude 配置的工程技能集合，涵盖 TypeScript 等实战经验。开发者可借鉴其中的最佳实践，提升代码质量与工程效率。
items.summary_en: mattpocock/skills is a collection of engineering practices extracted from the author's .claude directory, focusing on real-world TypeScript skills. Developers can adopt these battle-tested techniques to improve code quality and productivity.

items.title: iptv-org/iptv
items.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
items.author: iptv-org
items.summary_zh: iptv-org/iptv 整理了全球公开的 IPTV 频道列表，涵盖直播电视与点播内容。开发者可利用此资源构建自定义播放器或媒体聚合应用。
items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a curated collection of publicly available IPTV channels from around the world. Developers can use it to build custom media players or aggregation services with live TV and on-demand streams.

items.title: puppeteer/puppeteer
items.description: JavaScript API for Chrome and Firefox
items.author: puppeteer
items.summary_zh: Puppeteer 提供 JavaScript API 控制 Chrome 和 Firefox，实现浏览器自动化。开发者可借此进行网页截图、爬取、测试等任务，大大提升开发与运维效率。
items.summary_en: Puppeteer is a JavaScript API that automates Chrome and Firefox browsers. Developers can use it for web scraping, screenshots, and end-to-end testing, streamlining many browser-based tasks.

items.title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
items.author: harry0703
items.summary_zh: 利用AI大模型一键生成高清短视频，自动配音、字幕和剪辑。降低视频创作门槛，适合内容创作者和营销人员快速产出视频。
items.summary_en: MoneyPrinterTurbo uses AI LLMs to generate high-quality short videos with one click, including auto-dubbing, subtitles, and editing. It lowers the barrier to video creation, making it ideal for content creators and marketers who need quick video output.

items.title: ruvnet/RuView
items.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
items.author: ruvnet
items.summary_zh: RuView通过商用WiFi信号实现实时空间感知、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需摄像头。为开发者提供无隐私侵犯的室内感知方案，适用于智能家居和健康监控。
items.summary_en: RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection without any cameras. It offers developers a privacy-preserving indoor sensing solution for smart homes and health monitoring.

items.title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
items.author: Egonex-AI
items.summary_zh: 将任意代码自动转化为可探索、搜索和提问的交互式知识图谱。帮助开发者快速理解复杂代码库，提升代码审查和项目上手效率。
items.summary_en: Understand-Anything converts any code into an interactive knowledge graph that you can explore, search, and ask questions about. It helps developers quickly grasp complex codebases, improving code review and onboarding efficiency.

items.title: cypress-io/cypress
items.description: Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything that runs in a browser.
items.author: cypress-io
items.summary_zh: Cypress是快速、可靠的前端测试框架，专为浏览器环境设计。让开发者轻松编写端到端测试，实时调试，大幅提升测试效率和可靠性。
items.summary_en: Cypress is a fast, reliable testing framework for anything that runs in a browser. It enables developers to write end-to-end tests with real-time debugging, greatly improving testing efficiency and reliability.

items.title: colbymchenry/codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph, auto syncs on code changes, for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
items.author: colbymchenry
items.summary_zh: CodeGraph预索引代码知识图谱，自动同步代码变更，支持Claude Code、Codex、Gemini等AI代理。为AI辅助编程提供精准的代码上下文，提升生成代码的准确性和相关性。
items.summary_en: CodeGraph provides a pre-indexed code knowledge graph that auto-syncs on code changes, supporting AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini. It supplies precise code context for AI-assisted programming, improving the accuracy and relevance of generated code.

items.title: Statement on US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.author: Dylan1312
items.summary_zh: 美国政府对 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 的访问权限下达暂停指令。开发者需关注 AI 模型可用性变化，评估对依赖这些模型的项目可能带来的影响。
items.summary_en: A statement details a US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5, two AI models. Developers relying on these models must assess the impact on their projects and seek alternatives.

items.title: Claude Fable 5
items.author: Philpax
items.summary_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 推出的新 AI 模型，具备更强的推理和创造力。开发者应关注其能力提升，探索在应用集成中的新可能性。
items.summary_en: Claude Fable 5 is Anthropic's new AI model with enhanced reasoning and creativity. Developers should evaluate its improved capabilities for integrating into applications and building smarter features.

items.title: If you are asking for human attention, demonstrate human effort
items.author: jjfoooo4
items.summary_zh: 文章呼吁在请求人类注意时应先展示人类努力，强调真实互动的价值。开发者可借鉴此理念设计更人性化的用户互动机制。
items.summary_en: The article argues that asking for human attention requires demonstrating genuine human effort first. Developers can apply this principle to design more authentic user engagement and interaction flows.

items.title: Open source AI must win
items.author: vednig
items.summary_zh: 文章主张开源 AI 必须成为主流，以保障技术透明与公平。开发者应支持开源 AI 项目，确保工具链和模型的可控性。
items.summary_en: The piece advocates that open source AI must prevail to ensure transparency and equity in technology. Developers are urged to support open source AI initiatives for better control over tools and models.

items.title: Show HN: Homebrew 6.0.0
items.author: mikemcquaid
items.summary_zh: Homebrew 6.0.0 是 macOS 和 Linux 包管理器的重大更新，提升性能和兼容性。开发者应升级以利用更快的安装和更好的依赖管理。
items.summary_en: Homebrew 6.0.0 is a major release of the popular package manager for macOS and Linux, improving performance and compatibility. Developers should upgrade to benefit from faster installations and better dependency handling.

items.title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
items.author: xiaoyu2006
items.summary_zh: AI代理在扫描DN42网络时产生巨额费用，导致运营商破产。开发者需注意自动化代理的预算控制和风控机制，避免类似失控。
items.summary_en: An AI agent incurred massive costs while scanning the DN42 network, bankrupting its operator. Developers must implement cost controls and safeguards for autonomous agents to prevent runaway expenditure.

items.title: macOS Container Machines
items.author: timsneath
items.summary_zh: macOS Container Machines是一种在macOS上运行轻量级虚拟机容器的技术。它为开发者提供更高效的本地开发环境，简化依赖管理和跨平台测试。
items.summary_en: macOS Container Machines enable lightweight virtual machine containers on macOS. They give developers a more efficient way to manage isolated environments for local development and cross-platform testing.

items.title: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, including "undruggable" cancers
items.author: gmays
items.summary_zh: CRISPR技术实现精准摧毁癌细胞，甚至对传统无药可治的癌症有效。这为生物信息学和医疗AI开发者带来新的算法设计挑战与数据整合机会。
items.summary_en: CRISPR technology can selectively shred cancer cells, including previously "undruggable" types. For developers in bioinformatics and medical AI, this opens new avenues for algorithm design and data integration.

items.title: πFS
items.author: helterskelter
items.summary_zh: πFS是一种基于圆周率π的数字序列存储数据的文件系统。它挑战传统存储模式，为开发者提供去中心化、不可变存储的激进思路，激发对冗余与持久性的新设计。
items.summary_en: πFS is a file system that stores data using the digits of π as a storage medium. It presents a radical, decentralized and immutable storage concept, challenging developers to reconsider data redundancy and persistence in new ways.

items.title: Noise infusion banned from statistical products published by Census Bureau
items.author: nl
items.summary_zh: 美国人口普查局禁止在官方统计产品中使用噪声注入技术。数据科学家和隐私计算开发者需重新评估数据发布策略，可能影响差分隐私的应用方向。
items.summary_en: The U.S. Census Bureau has banned the use of noise infusion (differential privacy) in its statistical products. Data scientists and privacy-focused developers must rethink disclosure avoidance methods and the future of differential privacy in official statistics.

items.title: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
items.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

items.title: apple/container
items.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
items.author: apple

items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
